seo.title: Argenta Block Party — October 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: The Argenta Arts District's annual fall block party closes Main Street to traffic for a day of live music, food, local vendors, and community celebration in North Little Rock.

venue_address: Main St, North Little Rock, AR 72114
description: The Argenta Block Party closes Main Street to traffic for a full Saturday of live music across two stages, food trucks and restaurant pop-outs from the neighborhood's dining scene, local vendor booths, family activities, and the general festivity of a neighborhood that genuinely likes itself. The event is Argenta's biggest annual community gathering — the attendance typically spills from Argenta Community Theater on one end to the galleries and bars on the other, with the whole commercial block humming. The afternoon runs family-friendly; the evening skews toward the music and bar scene. October weather in Argenta is usually cooperative — cool enough for a jacket but warm enough for an outdoor afternoon — and the fall light on the historic district makes for a particularly good backdrop.
